base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_color_palette_variants — a ui (logo) from 1985 super mario bros. Documentation section — 'SUPER' word shown in 4 palette variants (Nestopia + FCEUX × title-color-1 + title-color-2). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Documentation section — 'SUPER' word shown in 4 palette variants (Nestopia + FCEUX × title-color-1 + title-color-2); not animated, reference-only
